attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
CASE WHEN NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS not NULL then  NJSLFVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
else(
case   when SVJEL.SS_CD   ='MFG' then -99999
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA' then -99998
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='BV' then -99997
   when   SVJEL.SS_CD ='QTC' then -99996 end
   ) end as  VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
CASE WHEN NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL
THEN (COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT ,0)- COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) )
ELSE NJSLFVI.DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
END AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
CASE WHEN NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL
THEN (COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,0) ) 
ELSE NJSLFVI.DV_USD_AMT
END AS DV_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL
THEN (COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) ) 
ELSE NJSLFVI.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
END AS DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
SVJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
NJE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  AS  TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
SVJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      ,
case   when SVJEL.SS_CD   ='MFG' then -666
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA' then -665
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='BV' then -664
   when   SVJEL.SS_CD ='QTC' then -663 end  AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS AP_VENDOR_NAME, 
case   when SVJEL.SS_CD   ='MFG' then -99999
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA' then -99998
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='BV' then -99997
   when   SVJEL.SS_CD ='QTC' then -99996 end AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
-999 AS EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
'-999' AS EMPL_ID, /* BASED ON DIFFERENT UPDATE STATEMENTS IT WILL UPDATED FROM JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR */
SVJEL.SS_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD ,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE SVJEL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE  NJSLFVI
                ON         SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT  = NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
                                AND SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT    =NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
                                AND SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE                =NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                                AND SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJSLFVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY SVFAH
		ON 	SVFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='Expense'	
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='Air Travel'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_COMPANIES ETC
 ON ETC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
 AND ETC.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID = 'Air Travel'    
 and ETC.BK_COMPANY_CODE <> '020' 
Inner Join $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT =  RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 and  RFMTY. FISCAL_YEAR_AGE between 0  and  2
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
	 ON ( NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
	 AND NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
where  SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')
